metadatos.titulo: Market Yield on U.S. Treasury Securities at 5-Year Constant Maturity
metadatos.descripcion: Market Yield on U.S. Treasury Securities at 5-Year Constant Maturity, Quoted on an Investment Basis. Averages of business days. For further information regarding treasury constant maturity data, please refer to the H.15 Statistical Release notes and the Treasury Yield Curve Methodology.
metadatos.fuente_original: Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System (US)
